post.description: Validates control authentication credentials for privileged miner operations.
post.summary: Authenticate the controls towards the miner

post.description: Applies per-board enable or disable state using hashboard index inputs.
post.summary: Enable board, true to enable, false to disable

get.description: Returns platform capabilities including model metadata, supported coins, and tuning presets.
get.summary: Provides miner model and all available coins and performance presets.

post.description: Resets accumulated hashrate metrics and associated historical counters.
post.summary: Clears the hashrate data collected by the miner

get.description: Returns the clock per chip for each hashboard

200.description: Individual chip clock for all boards

get.summary: Returns the clock per chip

get.description: Returns per-chip PLL/core clock selector settings and board-level clock configuration context.

200.description: Individual chip's clock signal generators and core clock selects config for all boards and board clock average

get.summary: Returns the clock signal generators and core clock selects config per chip for all boards and board clock average

post.description: Updates active coin selection and associated stratum connection credentials.
post.summary: Supports up to 3 stratum_configs

post.description: The default is set to 100c
post.summary: Change the critical temperature threshold of the miner

post.description: Restores miner settings to default configuration values.
post.summary: Reset miner to default configs

post.description: Sets whether failed hashboards are automatically disabled.
post.summary: Set if hashboards should be disabled if they fail.

post.description:
Setting to true will automatically re-enable any disabled boards if the miner remains idle for more than 10 minutes. This does not restart the miner.
Setting to false will disable this feature
post.summary: Configures enabling boards on idle

get.description: Returns Ethernet interface settings including DHCP/static addressing details.

200.description: Current ethernet type of the miner

get.summary: Returns the ethernet configuration

post.description: Sets the minimum number of functioning fans required for operation.
post.summary: Set the minimum number of fans working required.

post.description: Provide a number from 1-100. Note: if the target sent exceeds limit, it will automatically be set to a number within range
post.summary: Manually set the fan speed or run Autofan with target operating temperature of the miner

get.description: Returns the hashrate per chip for each hashboard and hashrate difference compared to theoretical hashrate

200.description: Hashrate for all boards in MH/s

get.summary: Returns the hashrate per chip

get.description: Returns realtime hashrate for the rig every 10 seconds for up to 1 hour

200.description: Hashrate for all boards in MH/s

get.summary: Returns the realtime hashrate

get.description: Returns sampled hashrate points representing discrete measurement intervals.
get.summary: Returns the discrete hashrate of the miner

post.description: Supports up to 3 configurations
post.summary: Split the hashrate of the miner

get.description: Returns saved hashrate split configuration, including pool ratios and targets.
get.summary: Hashrate split pool config

post.description: Enables or disables hashrate split mode using existing split settings.
post.summary: Enable hashrate split

get.description: Returns current pool assignment and runtime status for hashrate split mode.
get.summary: Hashrate split pool status

get.description: Returns hashrate data polled every one hour for up to the past 48 hrs.

200.description: Pool hashrate history in the past 48 hours

get.summary: Returns pool hashrate history

post.description: True for unique, false for non unique
post.summary: Set status of the unique id

post.description:
IpAddress to select unique ID as IP address

MacAddress for MAC address

CpuId for CPU ID
post.summary: Set the unique id of the miner as either the IP address, MAC address, or the CPU ID

post.description: Turn the LED on
post.summary: Identify the miner

post.description: Controls miner idle behavior when pool or upstream connection is lost.
post.summary: On connection lost, the miner will go to idle. When disabled, the miner will continue to draw power.

get.description: Returns the primary miner runtime log as plain text.
get.summary: Returns the log of the miner.

get.description: Returns the miner error log stream for troubleshooting failures.
get.summary: Returns the error log of the miner.

get.description: OpenMetrics text output

post.description: Changes miner runtime state, including start, stop, or autostart control.
post.summary: Autostart or stop the mining program

get.description: Provides the active network mode and current addressing configuration.

200.description: Current network type of the miner

get.summary: Returns the network type

post.description: Applies network interface changes for DHCP or static addressing.
post.summary: Change the ethernet configuration of the miner

get.description: OpenAPI spec
Returns current OpenTelemetry exporter settings, including endpoint and span filters.
get.summary: Returns the gRPC Opentelemetry collector settings

post.description:
To disable opentelemetry, set the endpoint to null

Targeted spans can be set to [] to enable all spans, or to ["span1", "span2"] to enable only those specific spans.
post.summary: Pass on Opentelemetry gRPC settings. The miner will reboot to apply the changes.

post.description: May provide better efficiency when overclocking (Bitmain bm1366 only). Set to true to enable overdrive mode, false to disable.
post.summary: Configures overdrive mode

post.description: Updates the control password required for protected API calls.
post.summary: Set a new password for the miner. param contains the new password

get.description: Returns perpetual tuning mode, selected algorithm, and active target settings.

200.description: Perpetual tune information of the miner

get.summary: Returns perpetual tune algorithms setting of the miner.

post.description: Enables or disables the perpetual tuning subsystem.

200.description: The current perpetual tune status in boolean of the miner

post.summary: Enable or disable perpetual tune

post.description: Optional: minimum throttle target before idling (Bitmain only)
post.summary: Enable perpetual tune with specific target and algorithm

post.description: Resets perpetual tuning state and restarts tuning progression.
post.summary: Restarts perpetual tune algorithm on target hashrate

post.description:
Sets the PreInitCooldown maximum duration in seconds. This is the maximum time the miner can spend in PreInitCooldown.
If the max duration is reached, the miner will skip the initialization temperature checks and start mining.
Default is 300 seconds. Setting to 0 means the PreInitCooldown state will last for at most 0 seconds.
post.summary: Configures PreInitCooldown maximum duration

post.description: Provide 0 to reboot instantly
post.summary: Provide unsigned integer in param to specify a delay in seconds before the reboot

post.description: The default is set to 95c
post.summary: Change the shutdown temperature threshold of the miner

post.description: Performs a software reboot sequence without a full hardware power cycle.
post.summary: Softreboot the miner

get.description: Returns general data includes software, status, hostname, etc.
get.summary: Returns generic readable data for the miner.

post.description: Uploads and applies a firmware package update to the miner.
post.summary: Update the system

get.summary: Returns the temperature sensor data collected by the miner

get.summary: Returns the board temperatures

get.description: Returns per-chip temperature readings across all active boards.

get.summary: Returns the chip temperatures

get.description: Returns the configured system timezone used by the miner.

post.description: if the clock and voltage is too high, it will automatically be set to a maximum of 1000MHz and 15v respectively

post.summary: Change only the clocks of the chips in the miner

post.description: Applies board-specific clock targets keyed by hashboard index.
post.summary: Change the clocks for specified hashboards

post.description: Pass the hashboard id as the Index and chip id and the target value as the Data
post.summary: Change only the clocks for each chip for each hashboard in the miner

post.description: Pass the hashboard id as the Index, and chip id and the core pll select configs as the Data
post.summary: Change the core pll select config of plls on a chip

post.description: Sets the global miner voltage target in millivolts.
post.summary: Change only the voltage of the miner (in Millivolts)
